description_long: This is a large, modern multi-story house with a flat roof and a spacious, landscaped yard featuring palm trees, flowering trees, and multiple outdoor seating areas. The structure is composed of several interconnected rectangular volumes, with extensive use of large glass windows and sliding doors that provide ample natural light. The exterior walls are finished in a light tan or beige brick, complemented by white railings and metal accents. The property includes a gated driveway, a two-car garage, and a prominent front entrance with a decorative gate and steps. Outdoor amenities include a gazebo, a water tank, a trampoline, and multiple patios with seating and umbrellas. The overall design emphasizes open, functional outdoor spaces and a clean, geometric architectural style.
description: A modern, multi-story house with flat roofs, large glass windows, tan brick exterior, and landscaped gardens featuring palm trees, patios, and a gazebo. The property includes a gated driveway, garage, and multiple outdoor amenities.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, decorative gate, two-car garage, and landscaped front yard with palm trees and a central pathway.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the garage, driveway, and a large garden area with palm trees and outdoor seating, as well as the rear section of the house.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard with a gazebo, trampoline, water tank, and multiple patios, along with large windows and garden features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view featuring the trampoline, water tank, additional garden space, and the interconnected volumes of the house with visible balconies and terraces.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and sliding glass doors
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a decorative metal gate, steps leading to a recessed door, and is flanked by landscaped planters and a small porch area.
